历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 3203 → 15560 → 5570 → 2849 → 3641, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, there was an abnormal large backward shift (15560), rebounding to 5570 in 2023, further moving forward to 2849 in 2024, and slightly shifting backward to 3641 in 2025. The recent two years show a backward trend, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at approximately 3641. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province for this subject category: 2021: 9 students → 2022: 9 students → 2023: 9 students → 2024: 6 students → 2025: 7 students (Physics Category). The 2026 plan remains at 7 students (Physics Category), unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 44–53 range in recent years (approximately 48th in 2026), with a solid position among normal universities, also attracting science students to some extent. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive, with high enthusiasm for master's applications. Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (rated as average), with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Overall reputation is stable and slightly positive. Statistics (A), Ecology (A-), and Biology (A-) have some relevance to science enrollment majors (Computer Science, Physics), but not directly corresponding.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Computer Science majors is recommended (popularity index 67.8), cooling down from the high recommendation in 2023, but still relatively hot. Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended (popularity index 76.86), with related majors being quite popular. The total number of examinees in Qinghai Province for 2026 is approximately 48,000, with an estimated 30,720 examinees in this subject category, a slight increase of about 0.7% compared to 2025 (30,457), indicating slightly intensified competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Qinghai Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment in Qinghai accounts for a very small proportion of its total national enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3641, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in total examinees, and a slightly positive reputation, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with rankings moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3601, with a range of 3101–4101.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 44–53 range in recent years (approximately 48th in 2026). Among normal universities, it ranks only behind Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University, and is one of the six key normal universities under the Ministry of Education, with a solid standing. The reputation assessment for 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to high enthusiasm for its master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, with estimated applications exceeding 15,000), reflecting increased social recognition. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (rated as average), with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps, indicating a generally stable and slightly positive reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Marxist Theory, Education, and World History, A in Statistics, A- in Ecology, and A- in Biology, totaling 6 A-level disciplines. Among these, Education and Marxist Theory are highly relevant to its enrollment majors, strongly attracting liberal arts students.
